overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, featuring wet neon-lit streets, towering skyscrapers with holographic advertisements, and the iconic MILITECH building. The footage is from a video game engine (Cyberpunk 2077), showcasing atmospheric haze, reflective wet pavement, and dense urban architecture illuminated by vibrant cyan and orange neon lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic downtown street with glass towers and neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet pavement, observing the neon-lit glass buildings and holographic advertisements

notable_agents.action: walking toward the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall building with reflective glass facade and vertical neon light strips
large floating advertisement displaying animated graphics
tall pole with bright white illumination

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-slicked street in a futuristic metropolis, surrounded by towering glass buildings adorned with vertical neon signs. The camera moves forward along the sidewalk, passing sparse pedestrians while holographic billboards glow in the distance. The wet pavement reflects the vibrant cyan and pink neon lights, creating a characteristic cyberpunk atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with crosswalk and traffic control

events.description: ego crosses the multi-lane street at the yellow-striped crosswalk
enters covered area beneath the elevated concrete overpass

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the crosswalk while navigating around vehicles and pedestrians

notable_agents.action: white van driving through the intersection

entered.detail: road sign indicating speed limit of 40 units
massive elevated highway structure casting shadows below
brutalist architecture with illuminated vertical window strips

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a wide urban intersection where the camera crosses the wet asphalt crosswalk. A speed limit sign and various vehicles are visible as the environment shifts from open street to the shadowy area beneath a massive concrete overpass. The lighting becomes more mixed as artificial streetlights compete with the ambient neon glow from surrounding buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under elevated highway

events.description: exits the covered walkway into the open plaza with massive holographic displays

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass while approaching the illuminated plaza ahead

notable_agents.action: person wearing a red jacket walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: massive orange-red holographic projection of a koi fish swimming in the air
large cyan-blue holographic projection of a bird or phoenix with flowing wings
safety barriers lining the edge of the walkway

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath the massive concrete overpass, the environment becomes sheltered and darker, illuminated primarily by artificial street lighting. Yellow concrete barriers line the path as the camera approaches an opening where enormous holographic projections of a koi fish and a blue phoenix become visible in the distance, signaling the transition to a corporate plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: corporate plaza with massive holographic advertisements and MILITECH headquarters

events.description: camera tilts upward to reveal the full height of the MILITECH building facade

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza while looking up at the towering skyscrapers and holographic displays

entered.detail: massive skyscraper with illuminated MILITECH signage at the top and vertical yellow accent lighting
futuristic transit shelter with glowing yellow trim

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens into a vast corporate plaza dominated by the towering MILITECH building and massive floating holograms. The camera moves through the open space, passing other pedestrians and futuristic transit structures, before tilting upward to emphasize the imposing height of the MILITECH skyscraper with its distinctive yellow neon lighting and corporate signage against the night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rain-slicked neon street through a dark urban underpass and into a towering corporate plaza. It begins by gliding along a sidewalk flanked by glass buildings and glowing holographic billboards, where the wet pavement reflects vibrant cyan and pink lights. As the camera crosses a wide intersection, the open street shifts into the shadowy depths beneath a massive concrete overpass, where artificial streetlights replace the ambient neon glow. The scene then emerges from the shelter of yellow concrete barriers toward a distant vista of enormous holographic koi fish and phoenixes. Finally, the camera enters a vast plaza dominated by the imposing MILITECH skyscraper, tilting upward to capture the building's distinctive yellow neon signage against the night sky.
